title: notebook-record-config output data
description:
Echo of the journaled configuration, plus the loud late-record disclosure.

``warning`` is non-null when the audit already had journal entries at
record time: recording a config moves every view_sha, so prior sign-offs
will read stale — correct, disclosed behavior.

goal.description: Echo of the recorded audit-open goal utterance (null when none was recorded).
goal.title: Goal

task_axes.description: Echo of the recorded audit-open task-axis utterances (null when none were recorded).
task_axes.title: Task Axes

warning.description: Non-null when the audit_id already had journal entries (views signed, receipts recorded, ...) when the config was recorded: the recorded config enters every canonical view recompute, so EVERY view_sha moves and prior sign-offs will read stale against the new canonical view. Disclosed, never silent.
warning.title: Warning
